LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-19-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOELL, HEIDI M AN INDIVIDUAL $8,936.33 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,736.33, (SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 437(C)"

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for summary judgment pursuant to CCP 437c" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
